overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a narrow rocky cave system with a torch. The character walks steadily through the warm-lit tunnel toward a distant blue-lit exit, transitioning from enclosed cave to an opening revealing an exterior night environment.

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the narrow cave passage, holding a torch to illuminate the rocky walls ahead

entered.detail: textured brown rock wall forming the left side of the cave passage
textured brown rock wall with crevices forming the right side
rocky overhead cave ceiling with stalactite formations
uneven dirt and stone ground covered with small rocks and debris
large rocks and stone debris scattered along the passage sides

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow, enclosed cave passage illuminated only by the warm glow of a handheld torch. The rough stone walls and ceiling create a tight corridor, with scattered boulders lining the path as the character walks steadily forward into the depths.

scene_state.functional_zone: cave passage approaching exit to exterior

events.description: blue ambient light from cave exit becomes visible ahead, mixing with the warm torchlight
approaching the cave opening revealing exterior night environment with cool blue lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing forward toward the cave exit, torch held high as the blue light from outside illuminates the path ahead

entered.detail: large arching opening at the end of the cave passage leading to the exterior
cool blue light streaming in from the night environment outside the cave
dry leafless branches and twigs scattered along the right cave wall

segments.scene_description: As the character approaches the cave exit, the environment transitions from enclosed tunnel to semi-open passage. Cool blue light from the exterior night environment mixes with the warm torchlight, illuminating dead branches along the walls. The cave ceiling recedes as the opening ahead reveals the outside world, with the stone walls now framing the distant exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic rocky tunnel that gradually opens into a moonlit exterior. It begins deep within a narrow, enclosed cave passage where the only illumination is the warm glow of a handheld torch reflecting off rough stone walls and scattered boulders. As the character walks steadily forward, the tight corridor begins to widen into a semi-open passage where the warm torchlight starts to blend with a cool blue radiance. The scene then shifts as the cave ceiling recedes and dead branches appear along the walls, before the stone framing finally gives way to a distant exit revealing the night environment outside.
